inputs.label: Arm Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from shoulder to fist when arm is fully extended

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from shoulder to fist when arm is fully extended
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kol tamamen uzatıldığında omuzdan yumruğa olan mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand von Schulter zu Faust bei vollständig gestrecktem Arm
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de l'épaule au poing lorsque le bras est complètement tendu
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde el hombro hasta el puño con el brazo completamente extendido
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة من الكتف إلى القبضة عند تمديد الذراع بالكامل

inputs.label: Arm Swing Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angular displacement of the arm during the punch

businessContext_i18n.en: Angular displacement of the arm during the punch
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumruk sırasında kolun açısal yer değiştirmesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkelauslenkung des Arms während des Schlags
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déplacement angulaire du bras pendant le coup de poing
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento angular del brazo durante el golpe

inputs.label: Hip Rotation Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angular rotation of the hips contributing to punch reach

label_i18n.es: Ángulo de rotación de la cadera

businessContext_i18n.en: Angular rotation of the hips contributing to punch reach
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumruk erişimine katkıda bulunan kalçanın açısal dönüşü
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkelrotation der Hüfte, die zur Schlagreichweite beiträgt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rotation angulaire des hanches contribuant à la portée du coup de poing
businessContext_i18n.es: Rotación angular de las caderas que contribuye al alcance del golpe
businessContext_i18n.ar: الدوران الزاوي للوركين المساهم في مدى اللكمة

inputs.label: Forward Step Length
inputs.businessContext: Linear distance moved forward by the body during the punch

businessContext_i18n.en: Linear distance moved forward by the body during the punch
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumruk sırasında vücudun ileri doğru hareket ettiği doğrusal mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Lineare Vorwärtsbewegung des Körpers während des Schlags
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance linéaire parcourue par le corps vers l'avant pendant le coup de poing
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia lineal que el cuerpo avanza durante el golpe
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الخطية التي يتحركها الجسم للأمام أثناء اللكمة

inputs.label: Punch Duration

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from initiation to full extension of the punch
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yumruğun başlatılmasından tam uzamaya kadar geçen süre
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit vom Start bis zum vollständigen Ausfahren des Stempels
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps entre l'initiation et l'extension complète du coup de poing
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo desde el inicio hasta la extensión completa del golpe
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت من بدء اللكمة إلى التمديد الكامل
